final:
module RefModule(
  input [7:0] data_in1,
  input [7:0] data_in2,
  input ctrl,
  output reg [7:0] data_out
);always @(*) begin
  wire [7:0] _tap_data_in1 = data_in1 & {8{1'b1}};

    if(ctrl) begin
      data_out <= ~(data_in1 + data_in2);
    end else begin
      data_out <= data_in1 + data_in2;
    end
  end

endmodule
